stmt: ∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] {g h : GödelFixpoint α}, g.1 ≐ h.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α], Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠⊤
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α], Consistent α → (Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ¬⊬ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ ⊠x
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ □x
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α] {h : HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [Prov α] [Reft α] [APS α] [C5 α], Nonempty (HenkinFixpoint α) ↔ Nonempty (GödelFixpoint α)
